_documentation: Smart Campus System — AWS Billing & Monitoring Alarms
This file contains AWS CLI commands to create all alarms.
Run each command from a terminal with AWS CLI configured.
1. Create SNS topic: aws sns create-topic --name smart-campus-billing --region ap-south-1
2. Subscribe your email: aws sns subscribe --topic-arn <TOPIC_ARN> --protocol email --notification-endpoint your@email.com
3. Confirm the email subscription (check your inbox)
4. Replace <SNS_TOPIC_ARN> with the actual ARN in all commands below

step_1_create_sns_topic.note: Save the TopicArn from the output — you'll need it for all alarms below

step_2_subscribe_email.command: aws sns subscribe --topic-arn <SNS_TOPIC_ARN> --protocol email --notification-endpoint your@email.com --region ap-south-1
step_2_subscribe_email.note: Check your email and click the confirmation link

1_monthly_budget.description: AWS Budget — alerts at 50%, 80%, and 100% of $1.00/month

2_forecasted_budget.description: AWS Budget — alert if forecasted cost exceeds $5.00

3_billing_cloudwatch.description: CloudWatch Billing Alarm — EstimatedCharges > $1.00 (must be created in us-east-1)
3_billing_cloudwatch.command: aws cloudwatch put-metric-alarm --region us-east-1 --alarm-name SmartCampus-BillingAlarm --metric-name EstimatedCharges --namespace AWS/Billing --statistic Maximum --period 21600 --threshold 1.0 --comparison-operator GreaterThanThreshold --evaluation-periods 1 --alarm-actions <SNS_TOPIC_ARN> --dimensions Name=Currency,Value=USD

4_ec2_cpu.description: EC2 CPU > 85% for 5 minutes — detect runaway processes
4_ec2_cpu.command: aws cloudwatch put-metric-alarm --region ap-south-1 --alarm-name SmartCampus-EC2-HighCPU --metric-name CPUUtilization --namespace AWS/EC2 --statistic Average --period 300 --threshold 85 --comparison-operator GreaterThanThreshold --evaluation-periods 1 --alarm-actions <SNS_TOPIC_ARN> --dimensions Name=InstanceId,Value=<EC2_INSTANCE_ID>

5_ec2_status_check.description: EC2 Status Check Failed — instance health issue
5_ec2_status_check.command: aws cloudwatch put-metric-alarm --region ap-south-1 --alarm-name SmartCampus-EC2-StatusCheck --metric-name StatusCheckFailed --namespace AWS/EC2 --statistic Maximum --period 300 --threshold 0 --comparison-operator GreaterThanThreshold --evaluation-periods 1 --alarm-actions <SNS_TOPIC_ARN> --dimensions Name=InstanceId,Value=<EC2_INSTANCE_ID>

6_rds_cpu.command: aws cloudwatch put-metric-alarm --region ap-south-1 --alarm-name SmartCampus-RDS-HighCPU --metric-name CPUUtilization --namespace AWS/RDS --statistic Average --period 300 --threshold 80 --comparison-operator GreaterThanThreshold --evaluation-periods 1 --alarm-actions <SNS_TOPIC_ARN> --dimensions Name=DBInstanceIdentifier,Value=<RDS_INSTANCE_ID>

7_rds_storage.description: RDS Free Storage < 2 GB — running low on disk
7_rds_storage.command: aws cloudwatch put-metric-alarm --region ap-south-1 --alarm-name SmartCampus-RDS-LowStorage --metric-name FreeStorageSpace --namespace AWS/RDS --statistic Average --period 300 --threshold 2147483648 --comparison-operator LessThanThreshold --evaluation-periods 1 --alarm-actions <SNS_TOPIC_ARN> --dimensions Name=DBInstanceIdentifier,Value=<RDS_INSTANCE_ID>

placeholders_to_replace.<AWS_ACCOUNT_ID>: Your 12-digit AWS account ID (found in top-right of AWS console)
placeholders_to_replace.<RDS_INSTANCE_ID>: smart-campus-db (the DB instance identifier you choose)
placeholders_to_replace.your@email.com: Your actual email address for receiving alerts
